list_info.科目名稱: 長期照護財源與支付制度專論
list_info.科目英文名: Issues in Financial Resources and Payment System of Long-term Care
list_info.限修備註: 限修科系:長照學系,限修班級:長照碩一,長照碩二,

detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部研究所碩士班	112學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 長期照護財源與支付制度專論 (Issues in Financial Resources and Payment System of Long-term Care)	開課班級 : 長照碩一	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 朱僑麗	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
This is an undergraduate-level introduction to the long term care insurance, which will provide a focus on selected issues that currently characterize this field. The course will introduce the definition of social insurance and financing, the policy of long-term care financing in the world, and the policy development of long-term care insurance in Taiwan. Our goal for this class is to help you understand the basic concepts and theoretical perspectives which have directed relevant policy. 


2.教學綱要

Our goal for this class is to help you understand the basic concepts and theoretical perspectives which have directed relevant policy.
